name: 平均数/中位数/众数
subject: math
domain_name: 统计与概率 / Stats & Probability / Stats & Prob
curriculum_points:
2 Solve linear equations in one unknown. Examples include:
• 3x + 4 = 10
• 5 – 2x = 3(x + 7).

3 Solve simultaneous linear equations in two
unknowns.

4 Change the subject of simple formulas. e.g. change the subject of formulas where:
• the subject only appears once
• there is not a power or root of the subject.

excerpts.text:
2 Solve linear equations in one unknown. Examples include:
• 3x + 4 = 10
• 5 – 2x = 3(x + 7).

3 Solve simultaneous linear equations in two
unknowns.

4 Change the subject of simple formulas. e.g. change the subject of formulas where:
• the subject only appears once
• there is not a power or root of the subject.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 数学可视化：参数调节探索函数图像

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「平均数/中位数/众数」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：2 Solve linear equations in one unknown. Examples include:
• 3x + 4 = 10
• 5 – 2x = 3(x + 7).…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：3 Solve simultaneous linear equations in two
unknowns.… 对理解「平均数/中位数/众数」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
